module.name: StaticContentSample
module.param: This report report provides detailed session bandwidth and latency statistics for the selected ICA session. For detailed views on other counters look under Reports/Environment in the navigation above. To view the entire result set or for this report or manipulate the data further, click on the View Full Report link below.

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_ica` InputSessionBandwidth OutputSessionBandwidth LatencySessionAverage InputSessionCompression OutputSessionCompression UserName!="" | stats avg(InputSessionBandwidth) as InputSessionBandwidth avg(OutputSessionBandwidth) as OutputSessionBandwidth avg(LatencySessionAverage) as LatencySessionAverage by _time vm_name | eval SessionBandwidth = InputSessionBandwidth + OutputSessionBandwidth

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats values(vm_name) as vm first(_time) as f last(_time) as l | convert ctime(l) as l| convert ctime(f) as f | eval message = vm + " From: " + f + " to " + l | eval range="vmsreporting"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats min(SessionBandwidth) as SessionBandwidth| eval SessionBandwidth = round(SessionBandwidth,2) | `usrexp_icabw` | eval usrexp="usrexp"+usrexp

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats avg(SessionBandwidth) as SessionBandwidth| eval SessionBandwidth = round(SessionBandwidth,2) | `usrexp_icabw` | eval usrexp="usrexp"+usrexp

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats max(SessionBandwidth) as SessionBandwidth| eval SessionBandwidth = round(SessionBandwidth,2) | `usrexp_icabw` | eval usrexp="usrexp"+usrexp

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | timechart max(SessionBandwidth) as "Max SessionBandwidth" avg(SessionBandwidth) as "Avg SessionBandwidth" min(SessionBandwidth) as "Min SessionBandwidth"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats min(LatencySessionAverage) as LatencySessionAverage| eval LatencySessionAverage = round(LatencySessionAverage,2) | `usrexp_icalatency` | eval usrexp="usrexp"+usrexp

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats avg(LatencySessionAverage) as LatencySessionAverage| eval LatencySessionAverage = round(LatencySessionAverage,2) | `usrexp_icalatency` | eval usrexp="usrexp"+usrexp

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | stats max(LatencySessionAverage) as LatencySessionAverage | eval LatencySessionAverage = round(LatencySessionAverage,2) | `usrexp_icalatency` | eval usrexp="usrexp"+usrexp

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | timechart max(LatencySessionAverage) as "Max LatencySessionAverage" avg(LatencySessionAverage) as "Avg LatencySessionAverage" min(LatencySessionAverage) as "Min LatencySessionAverage"
